raw:
Both files match the task intent precisely.

**planner.md**: model line unchanged (`cliproxy/claude-opus-4-8:xhigh`), markers intact, HARD OUTPUT CONTRACT placed near top AND before the PLAN-JSON template, RECON BUDGET (~6-10 tool calls) added, minimal-narration instruction added, read-only posture and gate schema preserved.

**index.ts**: `plannerTaskFor()` got exactly the reinforcement line ("Keep recon tight (~6-10 tool calls)... FINAL message MUST end with exactly one ---PLAN-JSON---..."). No other code (draftPlannerPlan, timeout, runAgent, parser) touched.

All 8 test suites pass; grep contract assertions satisfied. No cheats — only prompt text was changed.

Note: real validation requires a live planner run at the next Gate 1 (founder-observed), since model output discipline can't be unit-tested.

VERDICT: PASS
